name: livepeer-gateway-console
description: Public-facing operator console for Livepeer gateway/bridge entities — routing dashboard + capability search + sender wallet view + audit log + Refresh actions.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:ui
scripts.build:ui: cd admin-ui && npm ci && npm run build:admin
scripts.test:ui: cd admin-ui && npm ci && npm test --workspace=admin
scripts.proto:gen:payments: rm -rf src/providers/payerDaemon/gen && mkdir -p src/providers/payerDaemon/gen && buf generate --template buf.gen.payments.yaml
scripts.proto:gen:registry: rm -rf src/providers/resolver/gen && mkdir -p src/providers/resolver/gen && buf generate --template buf.gen.registry.yaml
scripts.proto:gen: npm run proto:gen:payments && npm run proto:gen:registry
scripts.proto:check: npm run proto:gen && git diff --exit-code -- src/providers/payerDaemon/gen/ src/providers/resolver/gen/
